basic_info.description: 👋 Hello!! I am Mohammad Shoaib. I am a third-year student of Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX). I am enthusiastic about Data Science and Business Analytics. I am acquiring knowledge of a wide range of domains, including deep learning, machine learning, data analytics, cloud computing, supply chain management and project management, to become prepared for the challenging future. I also participate in activities of various clubs and communities at university and outside to gain team-work and leadership skills.

projects.title: Extract Text From Images
projects.description: In this project I have used Azure’s Computer Vision API to extract text from image. I have developed the interface using flask and deployed it on Heroku

projects.title: Photography
projects.description: Personal project for study subject. I was responsible for testing photography application that optimizes images with popular algorithms used by graphic editors like Pixlr or Adobe Photoshop. I've earned A grade :)

projects.title: 3D Object Viewer
projects.description: One of the first apps I was working on my internship. I had to develop front-end implementation for app that shows 3D models of known buildings. This was also my first project in Angular framework. I've learned a lot!

education.title: Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX)
description: I am doing my major in Industrial and Production Engieering. I am an active member of different clubs and societies. I have also worked as a Class Reprensative. Due to covid-19, my university was not in session for a few months and our graduation has been delayed. I am expecting to graduate in 2022.

education.title: MITx on edX
description: The MicroMasters program credential from MIT Open Learning is a professional and academic credential for online learners from anywhere in the world. MicroMasters program in Supply Chain Management represents the equivalent of one semester of coursework at MIT. I had to complete 5 courses and a final comprehensive exam to earn the credential.
